templates: Server told me a {duration}-minute story about a {animal}. Best meal of my life. {stars} stars.
There was {chaos_descriptor} happening behind the counter and I felt SEEN. {stars} stars.
Pretty sure I saw a pig running with my bacon but {herb_quote_short} so honestly, who cares. {stars}/5.
The big guy with the smile waved at me from across the room. I cried. {stars} stars.
Came for the bacon, stayed because {herb_quote_short}. {stars}/5.
I do not understand what I just witnessed. Returning every Tuesday for life. {stars} stars.
My waiter looked me dead in the eye and whispered "..." and frankly that's all the seasoning I needed. {stars}/5.
Lost a fork. Found a friend. {stars} stars.

chaos_descriptor: what looked like a wrestling match
an extended silence I will think about forever
